title: astragalus legionensis
intro: Astragalus legionensis, also known as the Spanish milk-vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus legionensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Astragalus legionensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
